name: Spatial TF Activity Scoring
description: Infer spatial transcription factor activity on clustered spatial transcriptomics data using decoupler-py (DoRothEA + VIPER/AUCell). Produces per-spot TF activity scores, cluster-level top TF summaries, optional spatial smoothing/plots, and a detailed English text report describing parameters, data stats, and top regulators.

spatial_key.description: obsm key containing spatial coordinates; if missing, obs must include 'x','y'

cluster_key.description: obs column name containing cluster labels (e.g., 'cluster', 'leiden', 'louvain'). If null, will auto-detect from common names.

gene_id_type.description: Gene ID type in expression matrix; ensembl will be mapped to symbol where possible

tf_set.description: TF regulon confidence levels to include (DoRothEA)

method.description: TF activity inference method in decoupler-py

smooth_scores.description: Whether to spatially smooth TF scores using neighborhood graph

knn_k.description: k for kNN neighborhood (used when radius is null)

radius.description: Optional radius for neighborhood construction; if null, use kNN

sigma.description: Gaussian kernel sigma for smoothing weights

top_tfs_per_cluster.description: Number of top TFs to report per cluster

generate_plots.description: Whether to generate spatial plots for selected TFs

chunk_size.description: Chunk size for TF scoring to control memory

file.description: Clustered spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad) with spatial coordinates and cluster labels

output_config.collection_description: Outputs TF activity scores, cluster summaries, text report, and optional spatial plots.

items.description: Per-spot/cell TF activity scores (wide CSV). Columns: obs_id plus one column per TF with activity scores from VIPER/AUCell.
Cluster-level mean TF scores with top TFs per cluster

Detailed English text report (UTF-8) covering parameters, data overview (observations, genes, clusters), TF set/method, smoothing settings, score distribution, top TFs per cluster, and output file references.
Spatial heatmaps for selected TFs (generated when generate_plots=true)
